description: User successfully creates a new account. Fire after signUp() resolves. Properties: signup_method ('email').
User successfully signs in to an existing account. Fire after signIn() resolves. Properties: signin_method ('email').
User clicks the Sign Out button on the Account page. Fire in handleSignOut before navigate.
User clicks 'Add to Cart' on Store page (featured or grid item). Properties: product_id, product_name, price, is_featured (boolean).
User opens the cart drawer. Fire when isOpen transitions to true in CartDrawer. Properties: cart_item_count, cart_total.
User clicks the Checkout button inside the cart drawer (goToCheckout). Properties: cart_item_count, cart_total.
User advances from Shipping step to Payment step. Properties: step_name ('Shipping'), step_number (1).
Order is confirmed after placeOrder() resolves. Properties: order_number, item_count, subtotal, shipping_cost, total, shipping_method, is_authenticated (boolean).
User submits the inquiry form in InquiryModal. Properties: service_type (service.id: 'instagram' | 'appearances' | 'consulting'), has_org (boolean).
User opens the inquiry modal by clicking a service CTA on the Business page. Properties: service_type (service.id).
